product.name: CLOUDY BAY 12-inch CRI90+15W 3000K/4000K/5000K Color Temperature Adjustable Dimmable LED Wall Sconce, ETL Listed LED Half Moon Wall Fixture, Brushed Nickel
features: Simple and Modern: The delicately designed LED wall sconce adds a finishing touch to your home's existing decor.
Energy Saving:15W to replace 100W incandescent light,saves 80% of your electric bill. Integrated with LED chips, not bulb replaceable
Dimmable: Works with most LED dimmers,dimming range 10%-100%.(Please refer to the dimmer list)
Sturdy and Safety: Cloudy Bay wall light has a sturdy acrylic shade to diffuse the light even and bright. Also safe and easy to use with ETL standard.
Based on 3-5 hours’ everyday use.If for any reason you are not satisfied with your purchase, please contact us for an easy and fast replacement.
